name: cap-screen-recorder
title: Cap Screen Recorder
description: Control Cap screen recorder from Raycast — start, stop, pause, resume, and switch devices
author: Ojas2095

commands.name: start-recording
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Start a new screen recording with Cap

commands.name: stop-recording
commands.title: Stop Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Stop the current Cap screen recording

commands.name: pause-resume-recording
commands.title: Pause / Resume Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Toggle pause state of the current Cap recording

commands.name: switch-microphone
commands.title: Switch Microphone
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Choose an active microphone for Cap recording

commands.name: switch-camera
commands.title: Switch Camera
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Choose an active camera for Cap recording

commands.name: get-status
commands.title: Recording Status
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Check if Cap is currently recording
